theory KCL07_UK1_attack_manual begin

RHS: Multiset rewriting rules and restrictions [Diff] (8)

LHS: Raw sources (9 cases, deconstructions complete)

RHS: Raw sources (9 cases, deconstructions complete)

LHS: Raw sources [Diff] (9 cases, deconstructions complete)

RHS: Raw sources [Diff] (9 cases, deconstructions complete)

LHS: Refined sources (9 cases, deconstructions complete)

RHS: Refined sources (9 cases, deconstructions complete)

LHS: Refined sources [Diff] (9 cases, deconstructions complete)

RHS: Refined sources [Diff] (9 cases, deconstructions complete)

LHS: Lemmas

lemma recentalive_tag [left]:
  all-traces
  "∀ x #i.
         (Alive( x, 'Tag' ) @ #i) ⇒
         (∃ y #j #k.
           (((Challenge( y, 'Reader' ) @ #k) ∧
             (Response( x, 'Tag' ) @ #j)) ∧
            (#k < #j)) ∧
           (#j < #i))"
by sorry

lemma executable [left]:
  exists-trace
  "∃ x #i #j.
         (((Alive( x, 'Tag' ) @ #i) ∧
           (Response( x, 'Tag' ) @ #j)) ∧
          (∀ #k. (Alive( x, 'Tag' ) @ #k) ⇒ (#i = #k))) ∧
         (∀ #k. (Response( x, 'Tag' ) @ #k) ⇒ (#j = #k))"
by sorry

RHS: Lemmas

lemma recentalive_tag [right]:
  all-traces
  "∀ x #i.
         (Alive( x, 'Tag' ) @ #i) ⇒
         (∃ y #j #k.
           (((Challenge( y, 'Reader' ) @ #k) ∧
             (Response( x, 'Tag' ) @ #j)) ∧
            (#k < #j)) ∧
           (#j < #i))"
by sorry

lemma executable [right]:
  exists-trace
  "∃ x #i #j.
         (((Alive( x, 'Tag' ) @ #i) ∧
           (Response( x, 'Tag' ) @ #j)) ∧
          (∀ #k. (Alive( x, 'Tag' ) @ #k) ⇒ (#i = #k))) ∧
         (∀ #k. (Response( x, 'Tag' ) @ #k) ⇒ (#j = #k))"
by sorry

Diff-Lemmas

lemma Observational_equivalence:
rule-equivalence
  case Rule_Destrd_0_fst
  by sorry
next
  case Rule_Destrd_0_snd
  by sorry
next
  case Rule_Destrd_union
  by sorry
next
  case Rule_Destrd_xor
  by sorry
next
  case Rule_Equality
  backward-search
    case LHS
    step( simplify )
    by sorry
  next
    case RHS
    step( simplify )
    step( solve( !KD( x ) ▶₁ #i ) )
      case reader1
      by sorry
    next
      case tag1
      step( solve( TagRun( ~k, ~id ) ▶₂ #vr ) )
        case select_tag
        sorry // invalid proof step encountered
        step( solve( Tag( (z.1++<~k, ~id>) ) ▶₀ #vr.1 ) )
          case Setup
          step( solve( !KU( r1 ) @ #vk.1 ) )
            case c_fst
            by sorry
          next
            case c_h
            by sorry
          next
            case c_pair
            by sorry
          next
            case c_snd
            by sorry
          next
            case c_union
            by sorry
          next
            case c_xor
            by sorry
          next
            case c_zero
            by sorry
          next
            case coerce
            by sorry
          next
            case fresh
            step( solve( !KU( ~x.1 ) @ #vk ) )
              case fresh
              step( solve( splitEqs(0) ) )
                case split
                step( solve( (#vl, 0) ~~> (#i, 1) ) )
                  case d_0_fst
                  by sorry
                next
                  case d_0_snd
                  step( solve( (#vr.3, 0) ~~> (#i, 1) ) )
                    case Xor
                    by sorry
                  next
                    case d_xor_case_1
                    by sorry
                  next
                    case d_xor_case_2
                    step( solve( !KU( (~r2⊕z) ) @ #vk.2 ) )
                      case c_xor
                      by sorry
                    next
                      case coerce
                      step( solve( !KD( (~r2⊕z) ) ▶₀ #vk.1 ) )
                        case reader1
                        by step( contradiction )
                      next
                        case tag1
                        step( solve( TagRun( ~k.1, ~id.1 ) ▶₂ #vr.5 ) )
                          case select_tag
                          step( solve( Tag( (z.2++<~k.1, ~id.1>) ) ▶₀ #vr.6 ) )
                            case Setup
                            step( solve( (#vl, 0) ~~> (#vk.1, 0) ) )
                              case d_0_fst
                              step( solve( (#vr.5, 0) ~~> (#vk.1, 0) ) )
                                case Xor
                                step( solve( (#vr.4, 0) ~~> (#i, 1) ) )
                                  case Xor
                                  step( solve( !KU( (~id⊕h(<~x, ~k>)) ) @ #vk.2 ) )
                                    case c_xor
                                    by sorry
                                  next
                                    case coerce
                                    step( solve( !KD( (~id⊕h(<~x, ~k>)) ) ▶₀ #vk.2 ) )
                                      case reader1
                                      by step( contradiction )
                                    next
                                      case tag1
                                      step( solve( TagRun( ~k.1, ~id.1 ) ▶₂ #vr.6 ) )
                                        case select_tag
                                        step( solve( Tag( (z.1++<~k.1, ~id.1>) ) ▶₀ #vr.7 ) )
                                          case Setup
                                          by sorry
                                        next
                                          case select_tag
                                          step( solve( Tag( (z.1++<~k.1, ~id.1>++
                                                             <~k.2, ~id.2>)
                                                       ) ▶₀ #vr.8 ) )
                                            case Setup
                                            step( solve( !KU( r1 ) @ #vk.3 ) )
                                              case c_fst
                                              by sorry
                                            next
                                              case c_h
                                              by sorry
                                            next
                                              case c_pair
                                              by sorry
                                            next
                                              case c_snd
                                              by sorry
                                            next
                                              case c_union
                                              by sorry
                                            next
                                              case c_xor
                                              by sorry
                                            next
                                              case c_zero
                                              by sorry
                                            next
                                              case coerce
                                              by sorry
                                            next
                                              case fresh
                                              step( solve( !KU( ~x.1 ) @ #vk.3 ) )
                                                case fresh
                                                step( solve( (#vl.1, 0) ~~> (#vk.2, 0) ) )
                                                  case d_0_fst
                                                  by sorry
                                                next
                                                  case d_0_snd
                                                  step( solve( (#vr.8, 0) ~~> (#vk.2, 0) ) )
                                                    case d_xor_case_1
                                                    by sorry
                                                  next
                                                    case d_xor_case_2
                                                    step( solve( !KU( (~r2.1⊕z.1) ) @ #vk.4 ) )
                                                      case c_xor
                                                      by sorry
                                                    next
                                                      case coerce
                                                      step( solve( !KD( (~r2.1⊕z.1) ) ▶₀ #vk.4 ) )
                                                        case reader1
                                                        by step( contradiction )
                                                      next
                                                        case tag1
                                                        step( solve( TagRun( ~k.1, ~id.1
                                                                     ) ▶₂ #vr.10 ) )
                                                          case select_tag
                                                          step( solve( Tag( (z.3++
                                                                             <~k.1, ~id.1>)
                                                                       ) ▶₀ #vr.11 ) )
                                                            case Setup
                                                            by sorry
                                                          next
                                                            case select_tag
                                                            step( solve( Tag( (z.3++
                                                                               <~k.1, ~id.1>++
                                                                               <~k.2, ~id.2>)
                                                                         ) ▶₀ #vr.12 ) )
                                                              case Setup
                                                              step( solve( (#vl.1, 0) ~~> (#vk.4, 0) ) )
                                                                case d_0_fst
                                                                step( solve( (#vr.9, 0) ~~> (#vk.2, 0) ) )
                                                                  case Xor
                                                                  step( solve( (#vr.10, 0) ~~> (#vk.3, 0) ) )
                                                                    case Xor
                                                                    by ATTACK // trace found
                                                                  next
                                                                    case d_xor_case_1
                                                                    by sorry
                                                                  next
                                                                    case d_xor_case_2
                                                                    by sorry
                                                                  next
                                                                    case d_xor_case_3
                                                                    by step( contradiction )
                                                                  next
                                                                    case d_xor_case_4
                                                                    by step( contradiction )
                                                                  qed

                                                              next
                                                                case d_0_snd
                                                                by sorry
                                                              qed
                                                            next

                                                              by step( contradiction )
                                                            qed
                                                          qed
                                                        qed
                                                      qed
                                                    qed
                                                  next
                                                    case d_xor_case_3
                                                    by step( contradiction )
                                                  next
                                                    case d_xor_case_4
                                                    by step( contradiction )
                                                  qed
                                                qed
                                              qed
                                            next
                                              case pub
                                              by sorry
                                            qed
                                          next
                                            case select_tag
                                            by step( contradiction )
                                          qed

                                      qed
                                    qed

          by sorry
        qed
      qed
    qed
  qed
next
  case Rule_Send
  by sorry
next
  case Rule_Setup
  by sorry
next
  case Rule_reader1
  by sorry
next
  case Rule_reader2
  by sorry
next

  by sorry
next

  by sorry
next
  case Rule_tag1
  by sorry
qed

end

 Debug information

Visualization display

Theory: KCL07_UK1_attack_manual (Loaded at 17:38:32 from Local "/tmp/tmp.ulY9ZBouQF/KCL07-UK1_attack-manual.spthy")

Quick introduction

Left pane: Proof scripts display.

  • When a theory is initially loaded, there will be a line at the end of each theorem stating "by sorry // not yet proven". Click on sorry to inspect the proof state.
  • Right-click to show further options, such as autoprove.

Right pane: Visualization.

  • Visualization and information display relating to the currently selected item.

Keyboard shortcuts

j/kJump to the next/previous proof path within the currently focused lemma.
J/KJump to the next/previous open constraint within the currently focused lemma, or to the next/previous lemma if there are no more sorry steps in the proof of the current lemma.
1-9Apply the proof method with the given number as shown in the applicable proof method section in the main view.
a/AApply the autoprove method to the focused proof step. a stops after finding a solution, and A searches for all solutions. Needs to have a sorry selected to work.
b/BApply a bounded-depth version of the autoprove method to the focused proof step. b stops after finding a solution, and B searches for all solutions. Needs to have a sorry selected to work.
s/SApply the autoprove method to all lemmas. s stops after finding a solution, and S searches for all solutions.
?Display this help message.

  • Autoprove
